title: Tohri Challon

{{Quote|It is an honor to die in his service. Remember, my liege, that I was always loyal.|Admiral Tohri Challon|<ref name="Legacy 46" />}}
'''Tohri Challon''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was loyal to [[Roan Fel]] and his [[Empire-in-exile]]. Challon originally served [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Fel in the capacity of [[Imperial Adjunct]] and greeted [[Vikar Dorn]] when he arrived with the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|Star Destroyer]] [[Dauntless (Pellaeon-class)|''Dauntless'']]. However, as the [[Second Imperial Civil War]] progressed, she was elevated to the rank of [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]]. She was in command of the ''Dauntless'' when Emperor Fel met with the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order]] on [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]], and she [[Death/Legends|died]] in his service while preventing a [[First Sith Imperial Strikeforce|strike force]] from [[Operation: Thunderstroke|assassinating him]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|This is Admiral Tohri Challon, in command of His Imperial Majesty's Star Destroyer Dauntless, to all fighters—the Sith have obviously learned of our rendezvous with the Jedi.|Admiral Tohri Challon|<ref name="Legacy 45" />}}
[[File:Tohri_Challon_and_Vikar_Dorn.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Tohri Challon greets Vikar Dorn on Bastion.]]
In [[137 ABY]], [[Imperial Adjunct]] Tohri Challon was present at the Imperial headquarters on [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]], the seat of power of the deposed [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Roan Fel and his [[Empire-in-exile]]. She personally welcomed [[Vikar Dorn]], [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]], during the supposed defection of the entire crew of the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|Star Destroyer]] [[Dauntless (Pellaeon-class)|''Dauntless'']]. The defection, however, was part of a [[One Sith|Sith]] plot orchestrated by [[Darth Maladi]], a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lady]], to have Emperor Fel [[Duel on Bastion|assassinated]] by a Sith Lord named [[Darth Kruhl]].<ref name="Legacy 13" />

As the Second Imperial Civil War progressed, Challon was given the rank of [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] and took command of the ''Dauntless'', now part of the Fel loyalist [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]]. The ''Dauntless'' transported Emperor Fel to the agricultural world of [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]], a planet on the edge of Fel-controlled space, for a meeting with members of the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order]]. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Basile]] was her second in command.<ref name="Legacy 45" />

[[File:Admiral_Challon_and_Captain_Basile.png|thumb|right|200px|Captain Basile with Admiral Tohri Challon on the ''Dauntless'']]
[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Morrigan Corde|Nyna Calixte]], Director of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]], made her way to Agamar and interrupted the meeting with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to warn the Emperor that the Sith had [[Operation: Thunderstroke|had sent]] a [[First Sith Imperial Strikeforce|strike force]] to capture him. At the same time, the Sith-loyalist Star Destroyer ''[[War Hammer]]'', under the command of Moff [[Rulf Yage]], emerged from hyperspace and engaged the ''Dauntless''. Challon ordered her entire crew to engage the Sith forces in order to buy time for Emperor Fel to evacuate the planet.<ref name="Legacy 45" />

In the course of the battle, the ''Dauntless'' suffered heavy damage and lost its shields. Nonetheless, Admiral Challon ordered her crew to continue attacking the enemy to provide cover for the [[Defender One|Emperor's shuttle]], allowing it to escape to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. As the shuttle took the Emperor to safety, Challon paid her respects to her monarch, and hoped he would remember that she had always been loyal to him. The ''Dauntless'' was finally overwhelmed by the ''War Hammer'' and was destroyed. Challon and her entire crew perished in the explosion. Afterward, Fel quietly voiced a farewell to her and his lost soldiers, wishing for them to go with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="Legacy 46" />

==Personality and traits==
[[File:Challon_dauntless.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Admiral Challon commanded the ''Dauntless''.]]
Challon was a loyal follower of her monarch and joined his resistance against the Sith Empire, serving him even at the expense of her own life. She remained stoic as she knowingly faced her death and hoped to be remembered for her loyalty.<ref name="Legacy 46" />

Challon wore her [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] in cornrows and sported a circular [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoo]] on her forehead<ref name="Legacy 13" /> and tattooed lines on her cheeks.<ref name="Legacy 45" /> While on Bastion, she wore [[Robe/Legends|robes]] and had manicured fingernails.<ref name="Legacy 13" />
